operator_lock: Adam 2026-06-29 — LifeRE Alpha complete (machine alpha 12/12 PASS). New Point B: LifeOS Consumer Alpha — user auth + Lumin account identity + SocialMediaOS alpha. Machine builds, tests, and advances without waiting for Adam.

completed_milestones.label: LifeRE Alpha
completed_milestones.note: 12/12 machine alpha PASS. Founder reviews async.

target.label: LifeOS Consumer Alpha
target.point_a: LifeOS has no user auth system — all users are anonymous guests; Lumin cannot identify the account
target.point_b: LifeOS user can sign up, log in, access their tier, and Lumin identifies them by account — full consumer stack live on production
target.founder_success_test: Register account, log in via LifeOS app, Lumin greets by name with correct tier, daily command center runs as authenticated user

pipeline_after_lifeos.label: SocialMediaOS Alpha
pipeline_after_lifeos.note: SocialMediaOS intake blueprint is already running via never-stop expansion factory

doctrine.machine_alpha_protocol: Machine runs its own alpha walkthrough after each blueprint completes. PASS = advance, no founder wait.
doctrine.tools_not_destination: Governance, SSOT, receipts, and blueprints are tools accountable to A→B results — not the destination.
doctrine.synergy: Human + AI > sum of parts — Lumin fleshes broad vision with honest scoreboard
doctrine.chair_job: Ask until founder intent understood; then execute through real paths until Point B is reached or blocked honestly.
